title: Inject `xau_xag_ratio` at composition time (migrate inline TODO)
source: existing `# TODO(orchestrator)` at [pipeline/features.py:278](pipeline/features.py#L278) — migrating to the backlog so it's tracked, not buried.
why: Currently `xau_xag_ratio` is emitted as NaN by `_metal_cross` because the function doesn't have access to XAU's OHLCV when building XAU's own features. The orchestrator should call `compute_xau_xag_ratio` directly with `xau_df=ohlcv[XAUUSD]` and inject the column. Functional impact: the XAU/XAG ratio is a documented gold-vs-silver regime signal that's currently dead code.
scope: small change in the H4 orchestrator path (whichever script runs multi-asset H4); inject the column after `build_crossasset_features` returns.
